Then he plods along curiously. When it comes to the farm, he is as fearless as he is curious. He is always ready to get to the bottom of any noise, just like the grown-ups! He is sure to become a reliable yard dog one day.

name: Peacock
description: The peacock is undoubtedly the most elegant inhabitant of the farm. With his head held high, he strides majestically across the courtyard. He knows exactly how beautiful he is. He carries his long neck stretched out and balances a delightful crown of feathers on his small head. It makes a magnificent wheel out of its long tail feathers. Then you can see the colourful feathers in blue, green and gold. Even the hens are amazed – their cockerel can't do that! The peacock originally comes from India, but it also feels at home with Farmer Paul as long as it has enough space to strut its stuff.

name: MasterCave: Smashrador
description: The MasterCave stands as an impenetrable fortress. Even from afar, the fearsome dragon head with its massive jaws is clearly visible. When it opens, it's best to take cover quickly. A hidden firearm lies within its jaws. But that’s just the beginning of the obstacles. Foldaway stairs and deadly floor traps lurk along the path through the MasterCave. All to safeguard the super crystal, hidden deep within the fortress. Whoever possesses it wields power over all of ELDRADOR®. No wonder it's guarded so fiercely. Anyone who dares to embark on this quest must dodge swinging hammers and take cover from flying rocks. Not an easy feat. Can an intruder make it all the way to the super crystal? Three AAA batteries batteries batteries are required (not included).

name: BattleCave Arena: Lava vs. Shadow
description: Things are heating up in the arena! The BattleCaves are facing off and waiting for their turn. This is where the Creatures of ELDRADOR® defend their precious World Crystals. The dangerous Fire Bull is ready for the attack. He opens his mouth and shows his fangs. At this, he shakes his mighty head. Will the Shadowhound enter the battle and venture into the Lava BattleCave? The ELDRADOR® CREATURES BattleCaves will transform every children's room into an action zone! Who will join the breathtaking battle? All BattleCaves can be combined. Scary tunnels, and tricky traps await the attackers. In the big arena they can then meet for the final duel. What a fight!

name: Master Robot with Mini Creature
description: The Master Robot and his Mini Creature are wreaking havoc in ELDRADOR®. And they're flattening everything that stands in their. Last week, they crushed a juice box during lunch. Yesterday, they demolished a mountain of dirty socks in your bedroom. What will they destroy next? Popsicle castles and homework piles beware: The Master Robot is out of control!

name: Shadow Master Robot with Mini Creature
description: The Mini Creatures from the Shadow World are causing a real stir in Eldrador! They've even taken over the Master Robot. The Mini Creature can take a seat inside the robot and direct its steps from there - and even move the robot's arms. I wonder what they are all up to? One thing is for certain - trouble is coming. The heavy cannon and the quiver filled with arrows aren't exactly a good sign!

name: ELDRADOR® Starter Set
description: Your stories need unforgettable characters to come alive. The Hellhound and the Snow Wolf and the Rock Beast, put the snarling ferocity of ELDRADOR® in the palm of your hands. But be warned: When you let these fearsome creatures roam wild in your stories, epic battles can ensue. Will these creatures attack each other ruthlessly, or forge new alliances? How will the clash between lava and ice, stone and shadow, transform the world as you know it?

name: BattleCave Snow Slasher
description: A world crystal is hidden in the BattleCave. But you might want to think twice before stealing it. The treasure is guarded by the terrifying snow slasher. It waits for intruders with its head bowed menacingly and lets out a dangerous low growl. It’s always ready to pounce on anyone who gets too close to the treasure. It has turned the BattleCave into a real fortress. On one wall, a sharpened arrow is just waiting to be used and a giant pair of pincers is mounted on the roof. It can grab uninvited guests from afar and hurl them away in a high arc. Still thinking about stealing the world crystal? The ELDRADOR® CREATURES BattleCaves transform every playroom into an action zone! Who wants to take on the challenge? All BattleCaves can be combined with each other. Tricky traps lie in wait for the attackers. You can meet for a duel in the BattleCave Arena. What a fight!

name: BattleCave Stone Smasher
description: As mighty and still as a rock, the impressive stoneslasher awaits its opponents. It stands very still in front of the BattleCave, but nothing escapes the notice of its sharp green eyes. If you try to steal the world crystal from the BattleCave, you’d better watch out! The stone slasher swings its mighty crystal fist with lightning speed and blasts attackers into oblivion. If someone does manage to get past the colossus unnoticed, they are far from having made it. Intruders have to overcome a dangerous trapdoor. But as soon as they arrive inside the BattleCave, the trap snaps shut and they are captured. As if that weren’t enough, the stone slasher can also turn the huge screw! The ceiling is getting closer and closer. Will the attackers be crushed? The ELDRADOR® CREATURES BattleCaves transform every playroom into an action zone! Who wants to take on the challenge? All BattleCaves can be combined with each other. Tricky traps lie in wait for the attackers. They meet for a duel in the BattleCave Arena. What a fight!

name: BattleCave lava bear
description: The Lava Bear keeps a watchful eye on the BattleCave. This is where its precious Lava World Crystal is shopd. Anyone who wants to steal it must first get past the fierce Lava Bear, with its fire-like fur and razor-sharp fangs. Warning! He's poised to leap and ready to pounce on any attacker. The Lava Bear is backed up by the shooting range on the BattleCave's roof. A loaded crossbow is ready to fire! Anyone who dares to approach the BattleCave too closely will be grabbed by the giant gripper arm and hurled through the air! No escape now! The ELDRADOR® CREATURES BattleCaves transform any child’s room into an action-packed battlefield! Who dares to face the breathtaking battle? All BattleCaves can be combined for endless action. Cunning traps lie in wait for unsuspecting attackers. Creatures clash in epic duels in the BattleCave Arena. What an intense battle!

name: BattleCave Shadow Tiger
description: Help! Approaching the BattleCave is not a good idea! The vicious Shadow Tiger stands guard—this is no laughing matter! After all, he has to protect the world crystal. To do this, he has fortified the BattleCave into a fearsome fortress. A hidden trapdoor lies in wait, ready to capture attackers behind bars. If they even make it that far! A giant circular saw looms on the roof, ready to be fired! Get out of here! The ELDRADOR® CREATURES BattleCaves transform any child’s room into an action-packed battlefield! Who dares to face the breathtaking battle? All BattleCaves can be combined for endless action. Cunning traps lie in wait for unsuspecting attackers. Creatures clash in epic duels in the BattleCave Arena. What an intense battle!

name: Lunar New Year Dragon
description: If you're not careful, you can easily be blinded by the radiant appearance of the Chinese messenger of the sky. The sun glitters on the lizard's skin and the golden spikes on its back reflect its rays. The bringer of luck was inspired directly by the Year of the Dragon. Hopefully it will stick around for a while, because it looks great with those fiery red stripes along its back and the red markings on its head. It certainly knows how to defend itself with its sharp claws. Yet, it's usually it's very friendly, as you can see by the expression in its pretty green eyes. Who wouldn't want to have a friend like that?

name: BattleCave Lava Hyena
description: With glowering eyes, the Lava Hyena hunches up menacingly in front of its BattleCave. Who will dare to take up the fight? It's defending the World Crystal, which is tucked away in the BattleCave. In the Cave you can see a mean mask with the crystal in its mouth. Creepy – and yes, the eyes look like shooting arrows! Those who dare to climb the BattleCave must be careful, because the bars easily open into a sneaky trap. Once caught in the BattleCave, the lava hyena will certainly not let you run again so quickly ... The ELDRADOR® CREATURES BattleCaves turn every child's room into an action zone! Who will face the breathtaking battle? All BattleCaves can be combined. All BattleCaves can be combined. Scary tunnels, and tricky traps await the attackers. In the big arena they can then meet for the final duel. What a fight!

name: BattleCave Ice Rat
description: The Ice Rat looks really mean waiting there, next to its BattleCave. Its piercing cold eyes look closely at anyone wanting to pick a fight and steal the Ice Crystal from the BattleCave. Above the BattleCave, a dangerous ice slingshot is circling on a long chain, hitting anyone who dares to come close. But even if you manage to overcome the obstacle you are still far from having made it. To get the Ice Crystal, you have to go into the BattleCave. But a trap awaits: In a flash, sharp shards of ice flip up to deny access. Will anyone succeed in defeating the Ice Rat? The ELDRADOR® CREATURES BattleCaves will transform every children's room into an action zone! Who will face the breathtaking battle? All BattleCaves can be combined. Scary tunnels, and tricky traps await the attackers. In the big arena they can then meet for the final duel. What a fight!

name: BattleCave Jungle Tarantula
description: The Jungle Tarantula is a dangerous enemy to have. Its poisonous bite is feared. No wonder it was chosen to protect the World Crystal in its BattleCave! Every day, it lies in wait for the attackers and rolls over them with a big orb. It drops them down the chute right onto its enemies. And don't even try to trick the Jungle Tarantula and enter via the roof! There's a hidden trapdoor under the vines. If you step on it, you'll fall right into its poisonous arms. Nasty! The ELDRADOR® CREATURES BattleCaves transform every children's room into an action zone! Who will face the breathtaking battle? All BattleCaves can be combined. Scary tunnels, and tricky traps await the attackers. In the big arena they can then meet for the final duel. What a fight!

name: BattleCave Stone Chameleon
description: The Stone Chameleon has expanded his BattleCave into a real fortress to protect the World Crystal inside from thieves. With its oversized eyes, it can see from afar when attackers are approaching. Time to bring the catapult on the roof into position and put in the ammunition. Better take cover from the big orb coming your way! The Chameleon is a pretty good shot and can also attach the catapult to the side of the BattleCave if needed. The ELDRADOR® CREATURES BattleCaves transform every children's room into an action zone! Who will face the breathtaking battle? All BattleCaves can be combined. Scary tunnels, and tricky traps await the attackers. In the big arena they can then meet for the final duel. What a fight!

name: BattleCave Shadow Bug
description: Sneakily, the Shadow Isopod lurks in front of its BattleCave and tries to lure the attackers closer. Because this is where the traps have been set! If you're not careful, you'll be grabbed by the large claw trap, which grabs its victim in the blink of an eye and won't let go. And those who dare to climb the BattleCave will get the surprise of their lives. And not in a good way! The flap can be quickly opened and it becomes a rolling roof. No one can hold on to it and attackers simply slip off. The ELDRADOR® CREATURES BattleCaves transform every child's room into an action zone! Who will face the breathtaking battle? All BattleCaves can be combined. Scary tunnels, and tricky traps await the attackers. In the big arena they can then meet for the final duel. What a fight!

name: Ice Jet with Mini Creature
description: The Mini Creature whizzes past you in its ice jet like an ice storm. It looks pretty cool, because there are sparkling ice crystals on the jet. But you should still take cover, as the Mini Creature is unpredictable. If it doesn’t like something, it immediately fires its swivel gun. Once shot, there is no escape from the sharp arrow with the ice crystal. Save yourself if you can!

name: Jungle Jet with Mini Creature
description: Help, where did it suddenly come from? The mean little Mini Creature appears out of nowhere, driving its jungle jet. It looks so mean and certainly not ready to be friends. On the contrary: It inserts the pointed arrow with the crystal into the firearm and gets into position. What is it up to? Maybe it’s best not to find out and take a hike instead...Take cover!

name: Stone Jet with Mini Creature
description: Watch out, here comes the stone jet! Better not get in the way! Without hesitation, the Mini Creature rams into every obstacle to create a clear path for itself. This little meanie at the wheel should not be underestimated. The Mini Creature is very aggressive, after all, it’s driving a dangerous weapon – the stone jet. It’s incredibly fast and it even has its own firearm! Save yourself if you can!

name: Shadow Jet with Mini Creature
description: The Mini Creature races through ELDRADOR® at full speed in its shadow jet. Suddenly it slams on the brakes and brings its firearm into position. With lightning speed and a practiced grip, it inserts the arrow with the sharp crystal tip. Who has it spotted? The Mini Creature shifts into reverse and takes a run-up. Then the shadow jet lurches forward. It’s about to ram its opponent. You really shouldn't mess with the Mini Creature. Let’s get out of here!

name: Jungle Raptor
description: A screech in the sky over ELDRADOR® announces his arrival from a distance: The Jungle Bird of Prey circles there. He wants to be heard, because he guards the Jungle World from above. Nothing goes unnoticed by his sharp eyes. He immediately detects intruders. Anyone who doesn't flee in fear at his screech, he pounces on from the air at the speed of an arrow. With its powerful claws, it loves to grab intruders by the head and render them helpless. It is best not to attempt to enter prohibited territory at all.

name: Lava dragon
description: The lava dragon is the ruler of the skies above the lava world - anyone who intrudes upon his space has to deal with him! To defend himself, during a battle he thrashes his spiked tail against his enemies. And that really hurts! Fast-paced pursuits in the sky are no problem for him: his large, strong wings make him an agile hunter with the speed of an arrow! With his ultra-hot fiery breath, he can even melt stones - something which often makes the stone monster see red! The closer he is to the lava source in the temple, the stronger he is. It is also so nice and warm there!

name: Fire Eagle
description: His watchful eyes don't miss a thing: High above the volcanoes of the lava world, the fire eagle by schleich® ELDRADOR® CREATURES circles majestically through the air. His movable wings ensure that the skillful bird has plenty of propulsive force and easily masters complicated flight manoeuvres. The fire eagle perceives even the smallest movements on the ground - and if it's an intruder, the bird of prey doesn't hesitate for long: He spans his movable, transparent wings and dives toward the enemy. He pulls a glowing, blazing tail behind him, making him look like a falling comet. The fire eagle has razor-sharp claws, which he mercilessly grips with. Another weapon he uses in attacks is his curved, pointed beak. As a crowning glory, the fire eagle creates a massive firestorm with his wings, which simply sweeps his enemies away.

name: Ice griffin
description: The ice griffin has several pointy weapons to neutralise its enemies: in a duel, it first pierces the attacker's armour with its many, pointed claws, then it pecks at him with its massive, sharp beak. Sometimes it might do things in the opposite order, depending on what it feels like. What's more, the cold-blooded monster has six razor-sharp ice feathers on each of its mighty wings, which it uses to keep enemies at a distance. But sometimes it's already enough when it caws with deafening noise - because the sound is ear-piercing! Its opponents thus often choose to take off into the distance! It forms an ice-cold team together with the ice dragon, which rules over the bone-chilling heights of the ice world.

name: Ice Dragon
description: The Ice Dragon circles high above ELDRADOR®. Nothing that moves on the ground below can escape its beady and sharp gaze. Is danger lurking down there? The dragon does not hesitate: It folds its silver wings close to its body and plunges into the depths. The attacker on the ground won't know what hit it. As if from out of nowhere, the Ice Dragon appears, shaking its silver mane. It opens its beak to reveal a set of needle-sharp teeth. Threateningly, the dragon flexes its muscles and tears deep furrows in the ground with its claws. Together with its comrades-in-arms, Ice Monster and Snow Wolf, it's off to battle they go! (Figures sold separately.)

name: Jungle Dragon
description: The Jungle Dragon has a firm grip on the Jungle World. No one dares dispute its supremacy. Why? Just one look at those powerful jaws, ready to crush anything, is enough. It bares its needle-sharp teeth threateningly. Anyone who gets too close is in danger of a painful blow from that powerful tail. It's even covered in sharp spikes for good measure. The dragon is better viewed from a distance, like when he spreads his huge wings and soars into the air. That's also its favorite place to be, because, from up there, it can keep an eagle eye on ELDRADOR®.

name: Shadow Dragon
description: The first sign of danger in ELDRADOR® isn't a shriek or the roar of battle. It's the dark...when the sunlight vanishes in mid-day and the air grows still. In that eerie quiet, terror takes shape in the shadows. Black of night arcs across the sky, the haunting silhouette of an awakened legend: the Shadow Dragon.

name: Ice Bug vs. Fire Kraken
description: Ice World vs. Lava World! It looks dangerous when the Ice Bug and the Fire Kraken fight each other. I wonder who is the stronger of the two? It's hard to tell, because they both look so scary. The Ice Bug keeps trying to grab the Fire Kraken with its sharp claws. But it defends itself with its flaming tentacles. The Ice Bug tries to dodge its countless suction arms, because they burn like fire and have dangerous pincers at the ends. This will be some fight!

name: Shadow Lynx vs. Rock Crusher
description: Threateningly, the Shadow Lynx opens its huge jaws to reveal its powerful fangs. But the Rock Crusher doesn't retreat one step. On the contrary: It comes closer and closer on its powerful clawed feet, waving its thick tail menacingly back and forth. This one is studded with transparent crystals that could be quite dangerous to its attacker! Then the Shadow Lynx raises its huge paw and tries to strike a blow at the Rock Crusher with its sharp claws. But it dodges unexpectedly fast, baring its teeth. It's hard to tell who the winner will be!

name: Stone monster
description: You can often hear the fierce colossus from afar - when he moves, all of ELDRADOR® shakes! Because the stone monster is so gigantic and heavy, he can only move slowly. He is also not particularly bright - but for that extremely strong! He can rotate his upper body around its axis, meaning he can cause a lot of harm and damage with his mighty stone fists. He gains his strength from the large crystal which he also uses as a dangerous weapon. He gets stronger and stronger each day because he eats more and more crystals from the stone world. He has now polished off so many that they are even growing out of his back! His greatest enemy is himself. He is actually practically invincible. But if he falls over, it takes ages for him to get up again because of his weight...

name: Lava scorpion
description: Incredibly dangerous - and very patient: the lava scorpion lurks well hidden in the rugged rocks of the lava world, waiting for its victims, and is ready to attack at all times. Its shell is made from hard, cooled lava stone, but liquid hot lava is bubbles inside of it. If an enemy gets too close to it, it attacks them without warning with his red-hot, ultra-strong pincers. If its prey doesn't hold still, it will feel a burning sting. In combat against multiple attackers, the lava scorpion also uses its huge stinger, which it can swing around like a terrible club in all directions. Because it can defend itself so well, it fears nothing and no one. So it always claims, at least. Because there is one creature it is in fact secretly afraid of: the ice dragon, with its icy breath, is a formidable enemy - and might blow the lava scorpion into an ice statue!

name: Lava Smasher
description: The Lava Smasher from schleich® ELDRADOR® CREATURES radiates so much heat that (almost) no one dares to get close. Because attackers know that everything the blazing giant touches goes up in flames. His massive body is made of molten lava rock, and a blazing mane roars on his head. Despite being so massive, the Lava Smasher is extremely agile, making him a fiendish opponent. The fact that he can completely rotate his upper body means that he never misses the slightest movement. Anyone who comes close to him is immediately discovered. With his movable arms, he grabs the enemy like lightning and shakes them hard. The Lava Smasher can also move his jaw: As soon as he opens his sparking mouth, his blazing fiery breath escapes - and it not only smells of burned rock, it's also unbearably hot!

name: Ice Giant
description: The Ice Giant from schleich® ELDRADOR® CREATURES lives up to his name: Chills run down the spines of his opponents as soon as they catch a glimpse of the frosty monster! An anchor caught in his body long ago and it is now frozen tight as part of his lower arm! The Ice Giant's arms are also movable and extremely strong. Deep in his back is a rusty, ancient sword, which he can draw at any time and use against the other creatures of ELDRADOR®. No matter what direction the enemy comes from: Thanks to his fully rotatable upper body, the Ice Giant can change his angle super quickly! But he also keeps his enemies in check with his movable jaw: When he opens wide, opponents meet his icy breath, which the cold-blooded giant uses to shock freeze his adversaries!

name: Stone Dragon
description: The ground shakes. The air rumbles. Is it an earthqake? A clap of thunder? This is no storm: A mighty Stone Dragon is rampaging right toward you. Are you a goner, dinner for a starving dragon...or is he running away from an adorable llamacorn? Only you can decide where the story goes next...adventure awaits! In a world of Lava Dragons and Ice Giants, of Stone Monsters and Shadow Panthers, schleich® ELDRADOR® CREATURES is erupting with characters that let your stories run wild. Invite adventure with our rich-in-detail figurines and world-expanding playsets. Every battle-ready brute in the realm of ELDRADOR® CREATURES meets rigorous national and international safety standards. Ignite limitless storytelling with schleich®!

name: Shadow Stone Monster
description: You'd probably rather not meet the Shadow Stone Monster in person! As a Stone Monster it was already pretty scary. But then it fell in battle with a stronger opponent. Now it has mutated into the Shadow Stone Monster and is more frightening than ever! On huge feet, it stomps through the terrain and waves its claws in the air. No grass or flowers will grow on earth that it thumps with its fist. The Shadow Stone Monster throws sharp, transparent crystals at its enemies. If that doesn't make you run for your life, it will scare you with a bloodcurdling scream from its huge gaping mouth. Let's get out of here!

name: Jungle Emperor
description: What looks like a tropical tree is actually our Jungle Emperor from the schleich® ELDRADOR® theme world. Thanks to his branches, the transformation artist can camouflage himself perfectly and blend into the surroundings. This means that he can suddenly surprise his opponents in battle or to escape doing the dishes. He uses the large shield on his left arm to ward off attackers or as a table during long train journeys. His hand is perfect for holding lianas or pencils and run through the children's room until he camouflages and hides in your pencil case. He waits there patiently until it's time for sport and he can run again.

name: Shadow bear
description: The Blizzard Bear has returned! Now he fights for the dark side as the fearsome Shadow Bear. After falling in battle against the Shadow World, he underwent a dark transformation. With his new, mystical Shadow World look, he is even more imposing and menacing than before. A unique collectible figurine that will make every schleich® fan’s heart race and enhance any collection!

name: Creature Set
description: The battle can begin immediately. This is where two fierce inhabitants from ELDRADOR® are lurking. They come from different worlds—Shadow World and Stone World. But they have one thing in common: a foul temper and sharp teeth that they love to use. This time, Shadow Wolf and Granite Wolf charge into battle!

name: BattleCave Super Crystal
description: The hunt for the Super Crystal has begun! Only the player who has managed to claim all five World Crystals from the various BattleCaves and unite them to form the Super Crystal has reached the goal: Power over all ELDRADOR®! It's a hard task, because the World Crystals are not so easy to put together. Those who make it should be careful to protect their precious treasure. The Super Crystal is in good hands in the BattleCave. Only those who know the combination can open the safe. Who will be the future ruler of ELDRADOR®? The ELDRADOR® CREATURES BattleCaves transform every children's room into an action zone! Who will face the breathtaking battle? All BattleCaves can be combined. Scary tunnels, and tricky traps await the attackers. In the big arena they can then meet for the final duel. What a fight!

name: Catapult with Mini Creature
description: Oh dear! The creatures of the Shadow World have snatched the catapult as well! Whoever owns the catapult can use it to fearlessly travel through Eldrador and face down any enemy. On board the catapult are two projectiles that can be inserted in the front. Pyramids made of enemy MINI CREATURES can easily be toppled with it! The driver has also equipped himself for close combat. But the catapult looks pretty fierce by itself. Besides, there's a secret hiding place somewhere. Who can find it? By the way: All the collectible MINI CREATURES (sold separately) fit into the cockpit.

name: Fire bull
description: Uh oh: that smouldering in his eyes spells trouble. The fire bull is always in attack mode! Which is no wonder given how hot-tempered he is: all it takes to make him snap is for a single bird to perch on his spiky back, which is made of cooled lava! Anyone who approaches him will feel his pointy, glowing-hot horns, which can skewer even the best-armoured opponents. But even if they manage to dodge the horns they shouldn't start celebrating just yet: the fire bull has another ace up his sleeve in the form of his flaming tail - one hit from which will put even the most tenacious opponent out of action! Friend or foe, best not get too close unless you want your fingers burnt - under his hard shell bubbles a deadly-hot core of molten lava...

name: Saber Tooth Tiger
description: What is that bone-chilling sound? The roar of the fearsome sabre-toothed tiger echoes through the Ice World, heard from miles away. He greets every intruder with bared fangs and a snarl that chills the blood. He bares his giant, transparent fangs. Like frozen daggers, they protrude from his mouth, striking fear into attackers. Anyone daring to challenge the sabre-toothed tiger is in for a tough fight. Its thick back armour of ice floes is completely impenetrable. Nothing and no one gets past it.

name: Ice monster with weapon
description: Nobody is as cold to their opponents as he is. He is a tough and tenacious warrior who never runs out of breath, even during long duels. Anyone who doesn't watch out will immediately feel the effects of the strong fists of the gruff ice monster. With his mighty ice hammer, he can also freeze objects within seconds and then shatter them into a thousand pieces. As water is his element, he is, of course, a good swimmer and can even lie in wait for his enemies in the water world. His one weak spot: during a battle, only his water-repellent fur can protect him. His opponents should still wrap up warm, however...

name: Lava golem with weapon
description: The gigantic colossus is a real hothead: on the inside, he is made of red-hot magma; on the outside he is covered by strong cooled lava plates which protect him like armour. He becomes irritated extremely easily and doesn't waste time when it comes to putting his enemies in their place with his mighty lava axe. The weapon is so hot that he is the only one that can carry it! But he doesn't always use his axe. Anyone who gets in his way will get a taste of his mighty fists without any advance warning! But quick opponents know how to freeze the super-strong giant in his tracks: because he is so heavy, he can't run particularly fast. However, you should avoid getting your fingers burned by him...

name: Shadow Bat
description: The Shadow Bat from ELDRADOR® is a creature of darkness. Its whole body is perfectly suited to getting up to no good in the dark. Its oversize ears catch every sound. Attackers have no chance to sneak up undetected. If they try, this bat is already prepared for any uninvited guests. It digs its claws into the ground and spreads its wings. If the enemy approaches, it takes to the air and circles around the attacker, swooping down to bare its sharp vampire teeth. Will things end badly for the visitors?

name: Magma Lizard
description: Its yellow eyes look mean and know no mercy. Although the Magma Lizard looks like a fiery creature, it actually has a heart of ice. Anyone who dares to disturbs it is greeted with a sinister snort from its powerful snout. If that's not enough, it opens and closes his jaws in warning. You can even see its thick, yellow tongue. No one wants to get too close to the Magma Lizard. That would be much too dangerous. You might burn your fingers on the transparent fin of flames on its back!

name: Swamp Monster
description: Watch out! The Swamp Monster is lurking in the swamp and you can see immediately it’s not here to make friends. It has a pretty large mouth. I wonder what will get caught between those long fangs next! It may well end badly… But the Swamp Monster also has a spiked tail to defend itself. One blow from it can easily knock out any opponent. And the cleverest thing about the Swamp Monster is its ability to blend into the background, as it is perfectly camouflaged with its green scales. There are even lianas on its back, making it even harder to spot. If you are not careful, it will jump out and surprise you in the swamp. One snap and you’re dinner, so watch out!

name: Stone Smasher
description: Oops, did something just move? It’s easy to overlook the stone smasher in the stone world of ELDRADOR®, because it prefers to stand around motionless. With its gray stone-like skin, it really does look like a rock. It doesn’t like to be noticed, because then it can just think its thoughts undisturbed. Of course, it only does that on its days off. At the moment, its job is to guard the BattleCave. And it takes its job very seriously. With its crystal fist, it rams every attacker to the ground like a hammer.

name: Lava Bear
description: The Lava Bear is rarely seen, as his duty is to guard the BattleCave and protect the world crystal. However, he sometimes wanders through the Lava World. Would you really want to cross paths with this fiery beast on your journey? He has a scorching temper and is always ready for a duel. He opens his massive jaws and bares his fangs. At the very least, his thunderous roar sends everyone fleeing. Run for it!

name: Shadow Tiger
description: It’s instantly clear that the Shadow Tiger is the perfect guardian of the BattleCave, protecting the world crystal inside. He takes his duty seriously, watching everyone with his piercing red eyes. If someone gets too close, he lets out a warning hiss. Anyone bold enough to approach him should be ready for a fight: The Shadow Tiger doesn't joke around. He bares his fangs and lets out a thunderous roar. With his mighty paw and razor-sharp claws, he sends any attacker running in terror. No chance of defeating him!

name: Lava Tiger
description: Born in the fiery pits of the Lava World, a ferocious new predator stalks ELDRADOR® with a burning intensity. Beware the Lava Tiger! With its searing gaze and a red-hot temper, the Lava Tiger is ready to claw its way into the play stories of children ages 7 and up.In a world of Lava Dragons and Ice Giants, of Stone Monsters and Shadow Panthers, schleich® ELDRADOR® CREATURES is erupting with characters that let your stories run wild. Invite adventure with our rich-in-detail figurines and world-expanding playsets. Every battle-ready brute in the realm of ELDRADOR® CREATURES meets rigorous national and international safety standards. Ignite limitless storytelling with schleich®!

name: Granite Wolf
description: The Granite Wolf creeps through the night like a dangerous shadow. Its green eyes shimmer ominously. It's on the lookout for easy prey it can seize with its sharp fangs. If you look closely, in the distance you will spot the green glow of its poisonous back crystals just in time. Then it's a case of running away as quickly as possible, because the Granite Wolf is no fool.

name: Hellhound
description: Beware of the dog: anyone who wants to enter the lava world must first of all pass the hellhound. And this is not so easy. Its bark and growl are not only deafeningly loud, but it also has two heads – meaning it can take on two opponents at the same time! When it starts to wag its tail, intruders should get out of the way fast – in a battle it uses it as a red-hot burning whip! Armour made of hellishly hot magma also provides it with sufficient protection – it is no wonder that the hellhound is not afraid of anyone or anything. Well, there is one thing that makes it lose sleep, and that is the fear that the eternal lava flow will one day dry up...

name: Shadow Lion
description: In the darkest dark of night, when the icy wind cuts like a jagged stone, the sound thunders in your ear…it's your heart racing, alerting you to unseen danger. Your sense tell you all you need to know: The Shadow Lion is nearby.

name: Snow wolf
description: Anyone who enters the ice world had better take care – the snow wolf will definitely be lying in wait somewhere! With his white fur, he can move almost unseen in the snow and then, at the right moment, ambush opponents! Not even the smallest movement gets past his eagle eyes and, with his fine sense of smell, he can pick up even the faintest trail. He is a loner and also very tenacious, which is why he doesn't have a problem overpowering his opponents on his own. But when he needs help, he can call up the ice dragon with his wolf howl. The icy duo's opponents are then not only trembling from the cold. The snow wolf does not like the lava world (too hot) or the water world. If he is not thirsty, for him water should be frozen.

name: Shadow Wolf
description: Legend in the realms of Lava and Ice, Jungle and Stone tells of a hidden world in ELDRADOR®...a world where phantoms lurk in darkness, waiting...a Shadow World. As the battle of ELDRADOR® Creatures rages, a dark and menacing figure prowls the icy terrain. Transformed by defeat in battle, the Snow Wolf takes new form as a Shadow Wolf, its face frozen in a fearsome scowl. A haunting new story is beginning in ELDRADOR®!

name: Lava Hyena
description: When the Lava Hyena isn't guarding the BattleCave and the World Crystal, it's clearly looking for trouble. Restlessly roaming ELDRADOR®, it's always looking for trouble. If you're smart, you'd better not get involved. The Lava Hyena is a fearsome opponent. When it opens its jaws to reveal those sharp fangs, it sends an icy chill down your spine. And just wait till it throws its head back, breaking into a gruesome hyena laugh, your blood will run cold. No doubt: The Lava Hyena has already defeated many attackers. Let's get out of here fast!

name: Ice Rat
description: What's wrong with the rat? The mean Ice Rat hisses venomously and squints its ice-cold eyes into narrow slits. It might be a bad time for a visit! That's probably why it was chosen to guard the BattleCave of the Ice World. But even when it's off duty, the Ice Rat is looking for trouble. It loves to open its mouth and show its needle-sharp teeth. Easy to grab its victims by the scruff of their necks and bite down until they give up. Maybe we should give this creature a wide berth?

name: Stone Chameleon
description: The Stone Chameleon creeps through ELDRADOR® on silent soles. It's guarding the BattleCave and keeping a close eye on what's going on in the Stone World. Usually it sits tucked away and well hidden on a branch, encircled with its strong tail. From above it can see everything that's going on. It opens its large, rotating eyes. Is anyone coming? It deftly drops from the branch, appearing out of nowhere in front of the attacker. Opening its jaws you can see all those pointed rows of teeth! Let's get out of here fast!

name: Shadow Bug
description: The Shadow Isopod is no walk in the park when it comes to battle. Its armor is so hard and impenetrable that even the sharpest teeth shatter like glass. Its transparent, purple shimmering armor is also its strongest defense. Apart from its red glowering eyes, with which it fixes its victims. Small and mean, these eyes emerge in the darkness and are often the first thing you'll see of the Shadow Isopod. If you don't run away fast enough, it won't be long before you feel its sting. So watch out!

name: Shadow hound
description: Stop! Not one more step! This is the realm of the Shadowhound. No way does it want any visitors. Broad-legged, it blocks the way and flexes its muscles. Help, it has two heads! The Shadowhound lowers one head and bares its teeth, while slowly raising its other head and showing off its impressive set of teeth. No question: The Shadowhound is dangerous as can be. I wonder if it has always been this mean. After all, it used to be a Hellhound, before it was defeated in battle against the Shadow World and was transformed into a Shadowhound.

name: Lunar New Year Snake
description: The Lunar New Year snake impresses with its exclusive special golden paintwork and fiery red accents and, together with the Lunar New Year dragon, makes for a perfect collector’s duo. The two figurines not only complement each other visually, but also embody the deeper symbolism of the Chinese New Year. The snake, with its elegantly curved body and raised head, flashes its slender tongue – a fascinating detail that emphasizes its graceful appearance. As a symbol of wisdom and beauty, it is perfect for 2025, the year of the snake, and will be a valuable addition to any collection. This artistically designed figurine not only brings good luck, but will add a touch of exclusivity to any New Year celebration.

name: ELDRADOR® Mini Creatures Shadow Stone Robot
description: Stoooone headed your way! When the Shadow Stone Lord sits down in the Stone Robot's command center of the ELDRADOR® MINI CREATURES, from schleich® ELDRADOR® CREATURES, the tough duo goes into battle to save the Stone World. It's a bit like when a rider gets on a horse and gallops off. Unlike the horse, however, the Stone Robot has a gigantic hammer, which it skillfully uses against its enemies. They mostly come from the Ice World, Jungle World or Lava World. There is still no clear winner. That's probably also because everyone is quite enjoying the battle, but no one would admit it... a bit like when you fight with your brothers or sisters.

name: ELDRADOR® Mini Creatures Shadow Lava Robot
description: Watch out, a volcanic eruption! Oh no, my mistake. It's just our ELDRADOR® MINI CREATURES Shadow Lava Robot from schleich® ELDRADOR® CREATURES. Your orange friend loves to go for walks in nature with you. But when his home, Lava World, is crushed, even he gets in a bad mood. But who can blame him if he uses his red-hot lava axe to stand his ground in battle. When the time comes, you'd better get all your stuffed animals and other flammable toys to safety as soon as possible. With its weapon, the lava robot can effortlessly cut through ice or set entire jungle forests on fire. So better keep a glass of water next to your bed. And always be ready to cry: "Fire!"

name: ELDRADOR® Mini Creature Series 6
description: The nasty MINI CREATURES Series 6 are known throughout ELDRADOR® for their short fuses. They have a hot temper and are easily angered. Every single one of them looks pretty mean don’t you think? Things get particularly dicey when they turn up together. Because then they pile up into a giant creature and can take on any opponent. They all stick together, regardless of whether they come from the stone, lava, ice, jungle or shadow worlds. So it's best to steer clear of the MINI CREATURES!

name: Fire saurian vs. Jungle lizard
description: Who will claim victory here? The red Fire Dinosaur, with its flaming lizard comb and menacing yellow eyes? Or the Jungle Lizard, with its green back armour made of lianas and its two fearsome heads? Both warriors are fighting to the bitter end. Its terrifying roar can be heard from miles away. Horrifying! Run for cover before innocent bystanders get caught in the crossfire! Help!

name: Battle Rhino
description: The Battle Rhino stomps through Eldrador with its ten-ton body. It doesn't look like it as much of a sense of humor, either. Small eyes narrowed, this fighter has a mean glint in its eye. It knows exactly if you are planning to challenge it and will not hesitate to attack. The Battle Rhino looks like a rock that isn't going anywhere fast. But that impression is misleading! When it gets really angry, it can turbo-charge, taking a run-up and threatening its opponent with its dangerous, transparent horn.

name: BattleCave Arena Extension
description: The ELDRADOR® CREATURES BattleCaves transform every children's room into an action zone! Who will face the breathtaking battle? All BattleCaves can be combined. Scary tunnels, and tricky traps await the attackers. In the big arena they can then meet for the final duel. What a fight!

name: Shadow Panther
description: Careful! The Shadow Panther from schleich® ELDRADOR® Creatures prowls through the jungle undergrowth like a dark phantom. His jet black coat lets him move invisibly through the shadows to ambush his enemies. If an intruder comes too close, he leaps out of his cover to take his opponent by surprise and attacks them with his razor-sharp claws. Often the attacks ends up in a breathtaking chase, which the strong jungle inhabitant easily wins. The dangerous Shadow Panther is particularly proud of his lithe, spiny tails. They help him keep his balance during leaps. Plus, he can also use the strong tails as a double whip. The spines on the end of his tails and on his muscular back are very dangerous. They contain a paralyzing poison that immediately disables his enemies.

name: Jungle Tarantula
description: Anyone traveling in the jungle world should keep their eyes open for the dangerous Jungle Tarantula. You don't want to bump into it unexpectedly, because it's always ready to attack. But it can be hard to avoid. That's because the Jungle Tarantula likes to sit, well camouflaged and ready to ambush. When attacked, it likes to bite and spray its venom. Maybe we could take this trip to the jungle another time? That might be a good idea!

name: Ice Spider
description: Explore the mystical world of ELDRADOR® with the Ice Spider, a fun, educational toy figurine from schleich®! This set is authentically detailed, and is ideal for hours of imaginative play.schleich® is a German toy company, and we bring realism to a new level. Our high quality, immersive playworlds open up a world of imaginative possibilities to toddlers and kids through safe and educational play. All schleich® products are carefully designed to inspire healthy and creative pretend play for children as both a single toy or part of a larger collection. All products and the materials used meet or exceed the strictest applicable national and international toy safety requirements. We are the world's leading figurine company, and currently offer six different themed worlds and over 300 products designed to teach and inspire kids as they move through developmental stages. From the realistic worlds of FARM WORLD, WILD LIFE and HORSE CLUB to the mystical realms of BAYALA® and ELDRADOR® CREATURES, we put The World in Your Hands.

name: Jungle Chimpanzee
description: The Jungle Chimpanzee is feared across ELDRADOR®. And rightly so! It moves swiftly through the dense jungle, using its powerful, spike-covered liana tail. Silently, it swings from branch to branch, staying hidden among the treetops. Nothing escapes its keen eyes. With sharp yellow eyes, it watches every jungle visitor. If someone ventures too close, it leaps down from above, jaws wide open in a fearsome attack. So be careful! And always keep an eye above!

name: Ice Rodent
description: What a grumpy brute! The Ice Beaver is usually in a foul mood and easily irritated. You can tell he often gets into fights. His entire face is covered in deep scars. That makes him look even more dangerous than he already is. With ice-cold eyes, he glares at his opponent and bares his powerful teeth. He is protected by thick ice armour on his back and has a beaver tail made of ice floes. It's best to steer clear of this ELDRADOR® resident!

name: Lava Snail
description: The mean Lava Snail is approaching with a trail of slime. Very slowly, she fixes her victim with her poisonous yellow eyes and then approaches. She is certainly not the fastest. But she shouldn't be underestimated! When she goes into battle, she has a clever strategy: She retreats into her shell and hides there. Her shell is impenetrable, because it’s covered in spikes. If the attacker turns away, she emerges from her shell again and bites with her sharp teeth. This tactic works frighteningly well and has made her feared throughout ELDRADOR®. Nasty!

name: Jungle Boar
description: It's a bad idea to mess with this ELDRADOR® resident, you can see that right away. The Jungle Wild Boar lifts his mighty head and instantly opens his giant mouth. This troublemaker rarely avoids a dispute. Why should he? With his huge, curved teeth, the boar can defend itself very well and does so with passion. If you look into his yellow eyes, you can see immediately: Negotiating is pointless. Let’s get out of here!

name: Conquest of the Dino Temple Mega Set
description: Flynn is dying to get into the temple! There is a valuable treasure hidden in there. The problem is - the temple is being guarded by two dinos - the Monolophosaurus and the Postosuchus! The two carnivores follow him at every turn. Now he not only needs to find the right way, but also escape from the dinos. The temple complex is a real obstacle course. It looks different every time, because it can always be reassembled. Dangers lurk at every corner. Carefully, Flynn balances across the rotten suspension bridge. Done. The temple is right in front of him now. He is climbing the steps when suddenly they turn into a slide. Help! How can he get out of this room? When he finds the right combination of switches, the wall swivels and clears the way. That was hard! And now he still has to find all the key parts for the temple door in the secret hiding places. Before he finishes, he falls into a mesh trap. Who can help him out?

name: Large dino research station
description: Deep in the Amazon jungle, a hidden research station is studying the last living dinosaurs. Dino researcher Maxx Colby has an up-close vantage point to observe these prehistoric giants. Together with his brothers Luis and Flynn, Maxx is studying the eating habits of a brachiosaurus. Oh no! There's a ferocious velociraptor on the loose! Can the Colby brothers subdue the predator using the swiveling tranquilizer dart cannon? The story is in your hands...what comes next? The award-winning Large Dino Research Station playset from schleich® DINOSAURS is your gateway to science, adventure, and hours of limitless storytelling. The playset includes a velociraptor figurine, brachiosaurus figurine, a large research center, and dozens of immersive play accessories. The dino research playset is part of an immersive world of imagination with other playsets from schleich® DINOSAURS (each sold separately) - combine them for an ever-expanding world of exploration. schleich® dinosaur toys introduce the limitless possibilities of storytelling and imaginative play. name: Volcano Expedition Base Camp
description: Imagine you're a dino researcher studying living dinosaurs deep in the jungle. Suddenly, the ground begins to tremble, and thick smoke darkens the sky. It's a volcanic eruption! Jungle creatures flee as magma bursts from a crater and giant, fiery boulders launch in all directions. Run! The Volcano Expedition Base Camp playset is part of the schleich® DINOSAURS theme world. It features an exciting eruption that catapults stones from the volcano's crater. Built-in LED lighting illuminates the lava flow for realistic magma effects. Feel the earth tremble as the volcano vibrates and emits smoke (don't worry, parents - it's a cool pretend smoke). Three (3) AA batteries batteries and four (4) LR44/A76 batteries are required (not included). This playset comes with a realistic Ankylosaurus figurine and our popular Giganotosaurus figurine. For even more immersive play, combine it with the Large Dino Research Station from schleich® or any of our dinosaur-themed playsets (each sold separately). schleich® dinosaur toys introduce the limitless possibilities of storytelling and imaginative play. All our toys meet the highest national, international, and prehistoric safety standards.

name: Dino Temple Conquest
description: Right now Flynn is trying to get past the Monolophosaurus. The dinosaur is protecting the treasure in the temple and flexes its threatening jaws. No sooner does the prehistoric giant discover Flynn than he takes up pursuit. Get out of here fast! But how? The suspension bridge looks pretty rotten. He carefully balances over the beams, trying to avoid looking down into the abyss. Done! Now numerous puzzles are waiting for him to solve. He needs all the parts of the key to open the temple door to the treasure. To make things even harder, the temple steps look different every time, because they can always be reassembled. The pieces of the key are well hidden and Flynn scans the walls looking for secret hiding places. But even when he finds all the key pieces and put them together, the adventure is not over yet. He still has to dare to slide down the ropeway. He could use some support right now. Who can help him out?

name: Dino Transport Mission
description: The giant triceratops has spied a leafy green snack in the jungle: A salad bar of prehistoric proportions. Watch out, it's a trap!!! Too late: The dinosaur's Cretaceous appetite has led the triceratops into a perilous swamp. Can you help researcher Luis Colby rescue the ensnared dino? Or will certain doom await? Where the story goes next is up to you!

name: Off-road vehicle with dino outpost
description: Will the shark-toothed Giganotosaurus take the bait and prowl into the enclosure? Dino researcher Luis Colby won't rest until the fearsome carnivore is captured safely inside the fence. The perfect gift for dinosaur enthusiasts ages 4 and up, this 15-piece dinosaur playset comes with a dino researcher toy, a Giganotosaurus toy, a blue and yellow toy off-roader, a fence to capture the dinosaur, and lots of fun accessories for limitless storytelling.The rugged off-road vehicle is loaded for any adventure the jungle can throw at Luis. Detachable doors open and close for a quick getaway in the face of danger. The off-roader toy even includes emergency supplies to change a flat tire or refuel on long journeys. Need to haul or lift something? Use the winch attached to the front of the truck - perfect for hoisting bait to lure a carnivore into a gated enclosure! The Giganotosaurus figurine is so detailed, so authentic you'll be lost in the story - but always safe. Luis and his brothers, Maxx and Flynn (sold separately), are part of the schleich® DINOSAURS world of dino toys. Every day is a new adventure and a new story for fearless researchers! Where will their research take them next? schleich® dinosaur figurines introduce the limitless possibilities of storytelling and imaginative play. From fierce Giganotosaurus toys and the popular brachiosaurus toy to our popular Large Dino Research Station, schleich® DINOSAURS let your stories run wild. name: Dino Helicopter Rescue
description: The dinosaur has injured itself. Naturally, Flynn rushes over immediately. He jumps into his helicopter, puts on his helmet and flies over the Amazon. Right there! He can see the dino! He lands and skillfully throws a rope around the long neck of the prehistoric giant. That way he can take a closer look and examine it. Flynn leads the dino to the transportation bag attached to the helicopter and flies back. When he arrives at the camp, he first takes the dinosaur to an enclosure and gives it a juicy piece of meat to eat. Flynn will soon nurse it back to health!

name: Track Vehicle
description: What has Flynn brought back from his research mission? He has just captured a dangerous Dakotaraptor and loaded it into the cage on the track vehicle. It's better that way, because the giant dinosaur looks like trouble! Flynn certainly doesn't want anyone getting caught in those fangs! How did he manage to capture the Dakotaraptor? From the safety of his vehicle, he could elevate the cab to get a great view of his surroundings and spotted the dinosaur from above. Then he positioned the tornado gun on the roof and waited for the right moment to stun the dinosaur. Hit by the tornado gun, the Dakotaraptor was quite tame and could be loaded into the cage. Pretty clever!

name: Quad escape from Velociraptor
description: Watch out, Flynn! There's a ferocious Velociraptor lurking nearby - can you help our brave dino researcher escape on his quad ATV? Rescue the baby ankylosaurus and head to safety at the schleich® dino research station (sold separately). The perfect gift for dinosaur enthusiasts ages 4 and up, this dinosaur playset comes with a dino researcher toy, two dinosaur toys, the quad ATV toy, and related accessories.Flynn Colby is the fearless dinosaur researcher who faces danger every day in the name of science alongside his brothers, Luis and Maxx. A removable helmet keeps Flynn safe as he traverses tough terrain on his quad ATV. Moveable arms keep him secure as he patrols dense jungles in the all-terrain four-wheeler toy, always alert for the stealthy Velociraptor. The lifelike detail of the Velociraptor toy immediately transports adventure-seekers and scientists of all ages to the Cretaceous Period, while the texture of the heavily armored ankylosaurus toy causes even the fierce carnivore to think twice about approaching. This dino playset is a part of schleich®'s DINOSAURS world of toys.schleich® dinosaur toys introduce the limitless possibilities of storytelling and imaginative play. name: Attack of the dinosaurs trio
description: What's going on here? Two dinosaurs are getting into a big fight! The giant Giganotosaurus raises its impressively large body and lets out a terrifying roar. But the Baryonyx is not intimidated one bit: instead, it opens its huge mouth and shows its sharp fangs. The Ankylosaurus is not at all pleased, but decides to let the two carnivores fight it out. It hisses angrily and raises its spiky tail. Hopefully the two will leave the herbivore out of it!

name: Dinosaur Air Attack
description: The helicopter from schleich® DINOSAURS Attack from the Air is perfect for following and catching dinosaurs from the air. Dino researcher Luis specially developed a tranquilizer cannon to be attached to the helicopter. Luis takes to the air to take a round flight in his helicopter. But be careful! A large Tapejara isn't at all pleased to find the helicopter has entered its territory, and immediately takes chase. Luis skillfully uses the control stick to make a fast 180 degree turn. The Tapejara tries to swerve but Luis activates the tranquilizer dart and net perfectly. The dinosaur is caught and can be easily carried with the winch on the helicopter.

name: Tyrannosaurus Rex, red
description: Although the Tyrannosaurus Rex looked quite threatening, it could hardly use its front legs armed with just two claws since they did not even reach his mouth. Nearly seven metres tall and thirteen metres long, the Tyrannosaurus Rex was probably not a very skilled hunter, but rather a scavenger which probably fed on the leavings of other animals. It had more than fifty teeth measuring more than 15 centimetres in length which it used not for chewing but rather for tearing, since it swallowed its food in large chunks. To improve depth-perception when searching for food, the eyes of the Tyrannosaurus Rex were oriented toward the front such that the fields of vision of both eyes overlapped.

name: Tyrannosaurus Rex Blue
description: The king of the dinosaurs was once one of the largest land predators. It could grow to be up to thirteen meters in length and seven meters high. Given its size and mass, the T-Rex was probably not a hunter, but more likely a scavenger. It is presumed that the T-Rex had an exceptional sense of smell, with which it could detect carrion from a great distance.

name: Carcharodontosaurus
description: The Carcharodontosaurus is also known as the sharp-toothed lizard, which sums up this handsome dinosaur pretty well. It has two rows of extraordinarily sharp fangs in its movable jaw. The carnivore also needs them to dismember its prey. When it is hungry, it pursues its dinner persistently until he has snatched it. With its long hind legs, it’s quite fast when it comes to hunting. Best only meet up with the Carcharodontosaurus when it has already had its dinner!

name: Megalodon
description: The Megalodon with its grey, scarred skin is a real prehistoric giant. Despite its impressive size of around 17 meters and a weight of up to 60 tons, it swims through the sea at lightning speed – always on the lookout for prey. No wonder: Because of its size, it is always hungry and has to eat a lot. He opens his large mouth threateningly and reveals his sharp shark teeth. Once he grabs his prey, there’s no escape!

name: Edmontosaurus
description: The Edmontosaurus really is a giant at a height of 13 meters. But it's really friendly. You can see that right away. The Edmontosaurus is also rather pretty: it has a striking cockscomb on its head and a long neck. Its favorite thing to do is to take a leisurely stroll through the woods and meadows and have a nibble on the bushes there. But because it's so big, it takes ages to finish its meal of leaves and twigs. Maybe you can keep it company?

name: Acrocanthosaurus
description: The Acrocanthosaurus was around the same size and weight as the Tyrannosaurus Rex and Giganotosaurus. Unlike many other dinosaurs, it had seven openings in its skull rather than five. It also had lots of neural spines on its neck, back and tail, which probably formed a small "sail".

name: Giganotosaurus
description: The Giganotosaurus looks very similar to the T-rex. Both were dreaded hunters, had very short arms, walked on two legs and had a large skull. However, the Giganotosaurus lived much earlier and was at home in North America, whereas the Tyrannosaurus rex lived in South America.

name: Tyrannosaurus rex
description: Although the Tyrannosaurus Rex looked quite threatening, it could hardly use its front legs armed with just two claws since they did not even reach his mouth. Nearly seven metres tall and thirteen metres long, the Tyrannosaurus Rex was probably not a very skilled hunter, but rather a scavenger which probably fed on the leavings of other animals. It had more than fifty teeth measuring more than 15 centimetres in length which it used not for chewing but rather for tearing, since it swallowed its food in large chunks. To improve depth-perception when searching for food, the eyes of the Tyrannosaurus Rex were oriented toward the front such that the fields of vision of both eyes overlapped.

name: Brachiosaurus
description: Brachiosaurus translated means "arm lizard". It acquired the name, because its front legs were significantly longer than its hind legs. As such, its long neck pointed automatically upwards and it could eat taller plants with less effort.

name: Spinosaurus
description: The Spinosaurus was one of the most dangerous dinosaurs. It is considered the biggest carnivore because it was even bigger than the Tyrannosaurus rex and the Giganotosaurus! It can be easily distinguished from the other two dinosaurs by the spiny sail on its back and its crocodile-like snout.

name: Carnotaurus
description: The Carnotaurus is a meat-eating predator from the Late Cretaceous. It lived about 70 million years ago. The only skeleton ever found of it was dug up in Argentina. The Carnotaurus was 9 metres in length and estimated to weigh 1.5 to 2 tonnes. Its snout was more rounded than that of its relatives and its teeth looked like crooked knife blades. It was undoubtedly one of the most dangerous predators of its time.

name: Tyrannosaurus Rex
description: The Tyrannosaurus rex looked very menacing, but was hardly capable of using it short front legs equipped with two claws, as they could not even reach its mouth. At nearly seven metres in height and thirteen metres long, the Tyrannosaurus rex was probably not a particularly good hunter, but rather a scavenger that fed on what other animals left behind. It had over fifty teeth, measuring over 15 cm in length, but it didn't use them to chew, but to tear, swallowing its food in large pieces. In order to better perceive depths while hunting for food, the eyes of the Tyrannosaurus rex were pointed forwards, allowing the field of vision of its eyes to overlap.

name: Therizinosaurus
description: Of all animals that ever lived on earth, the Therizinosaurus probably had the longest claws. It used them to dig, grasp, pierce, and peel off bark. It lived towards the end of the dinosaur age, together with other herbivores such as the Kentrosaurus and Pentaceratops.

name: Mosasaurus
description: The movable jaw of the Mosasaurus from schleich® DINOSAURS contains many pointy teeth. When hunting prey such as fish or turtles, the dinosaur opened its mouth very wide and bit down powerfully. The shape of its teeth means that it probably didn't chew, and simply swallowed. As an adaptation to the habitat, its front and hind legs transformed into fins. It also had a fin on the end of its tail.

name: Quetzalcoatlus
description: On land, the Quetzalcoatlus doesn't look very elegant. But it make up for that once it's in the air! After it has taken off, the giant pterosaur can soar silently through the sky. It only has to flap its movable wings occasionally to stay on course. It can stay up in the sky for several hours at a time just soaring. I wonder where it will eventually decide to land!

name: Majungasaurus
description: Our Majungasaurus from schleich® DINOSAURS is one of the slowest dinosaurs in a sprint, but is still a huge fan of racecars. The lack of speed is because it is a very strong dinosaur, but doesn't have the right legs for its height. It also brings quite a lot to the scales - when grown up, your prehistoric friend weighs as much as two elephants. That and its length of just under eight meters means that it usually brings up the rear in the monthly dinosaur toy race. On the other hand, it's incredibly fast at mental arithmetic. It usually has its homework done before the math book is even opened. This means it can head off to lunch a few minutes before the others and isn't the last to arrive when they're serving its favorite food.

name: Tyrannosaurus Rex attack
description: Can Flynn protect Steggy the little stegosaurus from the dangerous T-Rex? Wild dinos are quickly subdued with the pole-arm.

name: Parachute Rescue
description: The jungle is a treacherous place for a young triceratops, teeming with hungry predators and dangerous terrain. Oh no! The triceratops is stranded on a rocky cliff! Sharp-toothed carnivores are closing in, and certain peril awaits on the rocks below. Can you help Ranger Maxx Colby rescue the little dinosaur? Strap on your parachute, Maxx!

name: Allosaurus
description: Who's that coming around the corner? You can tell it's the Allosaurus from afar, thanks to its heavy footsteps. Standing tall, the giant walks on two legs through the jungle, looking for prey. Although it is so big, it's pretty well camouflaged. In fact, its lizard skin is patterned so that it blends in perfectly with its surroundings. It inspects the area with beady yellow eyes. Let's hope it doesn't suddenly decide it wants a snack! No wonder this fearsome carnivore is one of the most dangerous predators in the dinosaur world.

name: Brachiosaurus
description: The huge Brachiosaurus can be seen from far and wide: As high as a house, its long neck juts out above the treetops. What is it doing there anyway? With its sharp teeth, it plucks leaves and twigs from the branches. It's rarely disturbed during mealtimes, and not just because of its size. The prehistoric giant is covered from head to the tip of its tail in fiery red lizard skin. It's a clever way for the Brachiosaurus to keep attackers at bay. But, as a vegetarian, it's not usually in the mood for a fight.

name: Tarbosaurus
description: From the powerful tip of its tail to its elongated head, the Tarbosaurus grows to be twelve meters long! This makes it one of the largest dinosaurs around. Its head hovers a lofty five meters above the ground! No wonder it has to eat so much. It loves to snatch smaller dinos for supper with its sharp teeth and flexible jaws. The Tarbosaurus runs after its prey on strong legs until it catches them, so it's best to stay on its good side!

name: Baryonyx
description: The long, narrow and flat head of the baryonyx from schleich® DINOSAURS is similar to that of a crocodile, making it an especially exciting prehistoric reptile. This dinosaur is believed to have hunted primarily in the water, and could immerse its perfectly shaped snout into the water to catch fish. It also had unusually large and heavy hook-shaped thumb claws to grab prey.

name: Parasaurolophus
description: The prehistoric Parasaurolophus could walk on either two legs or four...although this one prefers to ride a skateboard. If you're looking for a dinosaur gift, this hard-headed herbivore is a strong contender. schleich® dinosaur toys introduce the limitless possibilities of storytelling and imaginative play. All our toys meet the highest national, international, and prehistoric safety standards.

name: Cryolophosaurus
description: When the cryolophosaurus from schleich® DINOSAURS opens its movable jaw you can see its dangerous teeth! In the Early Jurassic epoch it was the largest carnivorous dinosaur and is the first dinosaur whose fossils were found in Antarctica. When it roamed the earth this part of the earth was not yet covered in ice. Instead it was covered with forests, though in the winter months temperatures dropped to under zero, which was extremely cold for dinosaurs.

name: Agustinia
description: The long, narrow spines of the agustinia make it look so unique that it is impossible to mix up with any other dinosaur. It was also covered with unusual-looking ossified skin plates. As a harmless herbivore it probably needed the spines and plates to protect against other carnivorous dinosaurs. The agustinia from schleich® DINOSAURS is also always ready to defend itself!

name: Brontosaurus
description: The Brontosaurus from schleich® DINOSAURS has a long tail, an enormous body and a narrow neck. The dinosaur grew to around 15 tons and 22 m. While skeletons of the Brontosaurus have been found, scientists have never found a skull. It probably had a small head similar to the Apatosaurus. The name Brontosaurus means "thunder lizard." Scientists used to believe that the dinosaur snapped its tail like a whip.

name: Diplodocus
description: The Diplodocus trudges in a leisurely fashion through the prehistoric world. It’s in no hurry at all, especially as it is on the heavy side. But this colossus doesn’t need to be scared of anyone. At that size, nobody wants to mess with it. If it does get angry, it whips its long tail threateningly from side to side. Watch how fast everyone disappears! Now it can get back to its favorite hobby: nibbling branches.

name: Triceratops
description: The Triceratops was one of the last large dinosaurs. Despite being an herbivore, it had a total of up to 800 teeth, which constantly grew back. Nonetheless, it was incapable of chewing food, as its jaw could not move from side to side. It used its teeth to cut up palm leaves and ferns.

name: Pachycephalosaurus
description: The Pachycephalosaurus from schleich® DINOSAURS is the largest beaked, herbivorous dinosaur ever discovered. It grew to around 4-5 m in length, 450 kg, moved on two legs and lived in the Late Cretaceous period in North America. Its strong domed skull was 20-25 cm thick. Scientists believe that it used the skull to ram or impress rivals. Pachycephalosaurus means "thick-headed lizard."

name: Ceratosaurus
description: The Ceratosaurus from schleich® DINOSAURS was a carnivorous dinosaur that lived around 150 million years ago in the Late Jurassic period. Two bumps at the eyes and a large horn on the nose were made of bone. They were used either in combat or to deter rivals. On its back were also numerous spike-like bones. The many bumps and plates gave it its name: Ceratosaurus means "horned lizard."

name: Kaprosuchus
description: The Kaprosuchus from schleich® DINOSAURS was named after its teeth and head shape: its name means "boar crocodile." The animal lived in the Late Cretaceous period, probably primarily on land where it hunted small animals. So far only one skull of the animal has been found in the Sahara, so scientists can only guess at its actual appearance. It's estimated that the dinosaur was around 6 m long.

name: Amargasaurus
description: Imagine you're a scientist researching deep in the jungles of prehistoric Argentina. You and your fellow scientists spy a long-necked dinosaur with two rows of spikes along the sauropod's spine. What on earth are those spikes? You and your fellow dino researchers are baffled. Can you come up with a theory? Your answer could shape the story of Amargasaurus for all of eternity. schleich® dinosaur toys introduce the limitless possibilities of storytelling and imaginative play.
